risk_title: Conflict-affected areas limiting project supervision and monitoring
risk_summary: Project areas in Gambella and Benishangul Gumuz regions are affected by conflict, constraining the World Bank's ability to conduct direct supervision and requiring widened internal audit scope and strengthened monitoring mechanisms.
evidence_quote: Some project areas are affected by conflict, such as Gambella and Benishangul Gumuz. The project needs to widen the scope of the internal audit and other monitoring mechanisms.

risk_title: Conflict-affected areas becoming inaccessible to World Bank supervision
risk_summary: Regions affected by conflict (Gambella and Benishangul Gumuz) are becoming inaccessible to World Bank supervision, requiring the project to expand internal audit and monitoring coverage in these regions.
evidence_quote: Widen the coverage of Internal Audit and Monitoring for the regions that became inaccessible to the WB supervision
